name: Annotorious
when_to_use: 需要用户在图片上画矩形/多边形区域并得到 W3C Web Annotation JSON 时用它而非手写 SVG 覆盖层,因为原生在绘制手势、缩放坐标换算、形状编辑和标准化序列化上失败。非做普通图片查看器或裁剪器。
why_valuable: AI 默认只能在静态图上画预先给定的框;默认做不到用户多边形绘制、控制点编辑、响应式图像坐标换算及 W3C 注释 JSON 往返。

data_in.note: boot 显式启用上游 W3CImageFormat adapter,所以 annotations 吃 W3CImageAnnotation,而不是 Annotorious 内部的 geometry/bounds 对象。矩形用 Media Fragments FragmentSelector,多边形用 SvgSelector;target.source 必须等于 image.src。

selector.conformsTo?: 'http://www.w3.org/TR/media-frags/' —— FragmentSelector 必填,SvgSelector 默认省略
selector.value: string —— 矩形为 'xywh=pixel:x,y,w,h';多边形为含 <polygon> 或 <path> 的 SVG XML

spec.note: 图片标注的几何换算要求图像在初始化前完成解码;默认把可视图像最大高度钉为 420px 并保持原始宽高比,禁用 vh/百分比高(铁律 3)。

example._why: W3C body/target/selector 层次与 FragmentSelector 字符串容易拼错,属于标注编辑器高歧义输入;minimal 钉住矩形的标准格式。

uplink._note: 本条不绑定统一事件出口;消费 AI 需要回传时自行读取 anno.getAnnotations(),adapter 会返回 W3C JSON。
uplink.widget: 消费 AI 自行把 anno.getAnnotations() 的 JSON 编入 sendPrompt 文案。
uplink.codex: 消费 AI 自行把 anno.getAnnotations() 交给 sendFollowUpMessage。
uplink.artifact: artifact 无上行;提供把 anno.getAnnotations() 下载为 JSON 的兜底。

carriers.widget: conditional:官方 CSS、img 与 SVG 覆盖层须一起放入 shadowRoot;远程图像域必须可加载
carriers.codex: conditional:ESM CDN + CSS + SVG,并依赖 image.src 可访问;跨域像素导出另受 CORS 限制

isolation.evidence: +esm:无 document.head/body 注入(样式走外链 annotorious.css,库运行时不注 head;grep 零 document.body);SVG 标注层渲入 img 父容器(entry 落 shadowRoot)。全局事件:`window.addEventListener('keydown',...)`(Shift 修饰键检测)+ initKeyboardCommands,均返回 cleanup 函数(destroy 清理);pointermove/多数 keydown 挂局部元素。widget 需把 CSS+img+SVG 三件套齐落 shadowRoot(entry 已做),故 conditional。

en.when_to_use: Use it when users need to draw rectangular or polygonal regions on an image and receive W3C Web Annotation JSON, instead of hand-writing an SVG overlay, because native implementations fail at drawing gestures, zoom coordinate conversion, shape editing, and standardized serialization. Not for a regular image viewer or cropper.
en.why_valuable: AI can only place predefined boxes on a static image by default; it cannot provide user-drawn polygons, control-point editing, responsive image-coordinate conversion, or round-trip W3C annotation JSON.

data_in.note: boot explicitly enables the upstream W3CImageFormat adapter, so annotations accepts W3CImageAnnotation rather than Annotorious internal geometry/bounds objects. Rectangles use a Media Fragments FragmentSelector and polygons use SvgSelector; target.source must equal image.src.

selector.conformsTo?: 'http://www.w3.org/TR/media-frags/' -- Required for FragmentSelector and omitted by default for SvgSelector
selector.value: string -- For a rectangle, 'xywh=pixel:x,y,w,h'; for a polygon, SVG XML containing <polygon> or <path>

spec.note: Image-annotation geometry conversion requires the image to finish decoding before initialization. The visible image is capped at 420px high by default while retaining its original aspect ratio; vh/percentage heights are prohibited (Rule 3).
